channel.title: Projects on codex
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on codex

item.title: Bookmark API
item.description: Bookmark API stack: Nest.js + deploy on heroku + portgresql db with prisma ORM live preview: https://nestjs-tryout.herokuapp.com/api/ github: https://github.com/Moanrisy/nestjs-tryout/

item.title: Keluargain
item.description: Keluargain stack: Express + mongodb + pug template engine live preview: https://bit.ly/keluargain github: https://github.com/Moanrisy/keluargain-express

item.title: Ninja List
item.description: Ninja List stack: Next.js + netlify identity live preview: https://playful-bubblegum-c070b1.netlify.app/ github: https://github.com/Moanrisy/ninja-list
